issue_summary: Use TimeZone from calendar in DateFormatUtils.
javadoc_before:
/** *

Formats a calendar into a specific pattern.

* * @param calendar the calendar to format, not null * @param pattern the pattern to use to format the calendar, not null * @return the formatted calendar * @see FastDateFormat#format(Calendar) * @since 2.4 */
javadoc_after:
/** *

Formats a calendar into a specific pattern. The TimeZone from the calendar * will be used for formatting.

* * @param calendar the calendar to format, not null * @param pattern the pattern to use to format the calendar, not null * @return the formatted calendar * @see FastDateFormat#format(Calendar) * @since 2.4 */
